calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-24-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-24-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: his matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff HSBC Bank Nevada, N.A., as Successor in Interest to Direct Merchants Credit Card Bank, N.A.
No appearance by defendant Janie Lee.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, November 24, 2008.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on May 23, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented and considering the declaration of Charmain Hopper in Lieu of Personal Testimony at Trial, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff HSBC Bank Nevada, N.A., as Successor in Interest to Direct Merchants Credit Card Bank, N.A., and against defendant Janie Lee as follows:

Damages/Principal - $8,306.78.
Interest - $957.60.
Attorney's Fees - $1,175.00.
Costs - $325.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $10,764.38.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-25-2008 Continued To Nov-24-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2008 Set For Trial On Aug-25-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
